evaluators.name: KJFK METAR/TAF in Today’s Briefing with Units and Order
evaluators.description: Checks that the current KJFK METAR and TAF are added to Today's Briefing, units set to knots & statute miles, and METAR ordered above TAF.

evaluators.name: KSFO VFR Cross-Country Route to Best Nearby Airport
evaluators.description: Checks that a VFR route named 'KSFO cross-country #1' departs KSFO, goes to the highest-rated suitable airport within 120 NM with runway >= 4,500 ft, and is saved to 'Practice Flights'.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying IFR Ground Course in Training Plan
evaluators.description: Checks that the cheapest IFR ground school course under $150 with rating ≥4.5 and duration ≥8 hours is added to a training plan with goal 'IFR Rating' and a 2026 target date.

evaluators.name: Earliest October 2026 IFR Weather Webinar Registration
evaluators.description: Checks that the user registered for the earliest IFR weather webinar in October 2026 with site notifications only and a 1-day reminder.

evaluators.name: Three Class B Articles Saved to Checkride Prep
evaluators.description: Checks that the first three most-popular Class B airspace articles (2022+ and ≤15 min read) are saved to the 'Checkride Prep' reading list.

evaluators.name: Preferred Trainer Between IFR C172 and Piper Archer
evaluators.description: Checks that at a Denver-area (CO) ≥4-star flight school, the preferred trainer is correctly chosen between an IFR-capable C172 and Piper Archer, each ≤$180/hr wet, using the lower rate or comparison order tie-break.

evaluators.name: Earliest Qualifying AME Saved to Medical Contacts
evaluators.description: Checks that the earliest-available AME within 30 miles of 30303 offering Class 1 medicals and weekday availability before 6pm is saved to the 'Medical Contacts' group.

evaluators.name: Short-Field Landing Question in Landings Forum
evaluators.description: Checks that a thread titled 'Short-field landing tips for Cessna 172' is posted in 'Landings' with ≥2-sentence body, exactly the three required tags, and site-only notifications.
